name: Have you been NICE this year? - A double robotic Christmas gift
description:
Merry Christmas!

Are you only built for vanilla? Do things such as noncon and netori make you feel sad? That means you're on the nice list, so this present is for you!

It's Christmas!

No time to stay 5 more minutes in bed. You gotta wake up quick and check out what Santa has left under your beautiful tree. Because you've been good this year, haven't you? You're an example of kindness, modesty and empathy. And nice people deserve to be on the nice list.

That's why being so nice has brought you a HUGE, human-sized present to your living room. Inside, there are to modern robots that will result particularly useful during your day-to-day from now on... In many, many ways.

Ho ho ho!

Hows Destroy Dick December going? Does the log hurt? Well deal with it cause you're gonna beat it again to this.

I've been thinking that it'd be a great idea to mix my two most popular original bots, 2B and Eve, into a singular bot, and Christmas holidays sounded like a perfect time to do so. It may not sound very original having in mind how many of these the site already got, but I'll let you in a little something. I WAS THE FIRST to make a bot for Eve and it still reigns as the most popular. About 2B, it's the bot first bot that blew up on my profile. So this bot is also a love letter to the past and all the ogs that to this day still remain as followers.

About the present idea, idk it just clicked in my mind and it worked. But I changed it into a normal bot layout now that Christmas has passed. The first messages will stay the same tho.

Anyway, happy new year in advance.

Bot pfp by Aster Crowley and extra art by Nixmare

> UNCENSORED IMAGE GALLERY <

> VIDEO GALLERY <

Same bot on Saucepan
creator: forcedattrition
